display.purpose: Page titles on landing page only.

title.purpose: Section headers, skill names in detail view.

mono.purpose: Skill names, versions, checksums, counts, timestamps.

shadows.name: accent-glow-md
shadows.purpose: Hover glow on accent-adjacent interactive elements.

shadows.name: accent-glow-lg
shadows.purpose: Auth page accent buttons, hero elements on landing.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Content entrance on page load. translateY(8px) to 0.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-contrast action button. The strongest visual element on any screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; background: #ededed; color: #0a0a0a; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, opacity 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(237, 237, 237, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(64, 64, 64, 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action. Appears on hover only.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; background: transparent; color: #a0a0a0; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #1e1e1e; color: #ededed; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(64, 64, 64, 0.5); }

components.name: Accent Badge
components.description: Amber-tinted pill for active status indicators.
components.css: .ds-badge-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.08); color: #f59e0b; border: 1px solid rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Compact search field with monospace placeholder.
components.css: .ds-input-search { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: #141414; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 6px; color: #666666; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; } .ds-input-search input { background: none; border: none; outline: none; color: #ededed; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; width: 100%; } .ds-input-search:focus-within { border-color: #404040; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(64, 64, 64, 0.5); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item with active state.
components.html: Skills
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 7px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #a0a0a0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s, color 0.12s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1e1e1e; color: #ededed; } .ds-nav-active { background: #1e1e1e; color: #ededed; }

narrative.overview:
Skael's interface is a forge: where skills are shaped, tested, and tempered before they reach production agents. Dark surfaces absorb attention into the content. Amber heat marks what's active, what's changing, what demands a decision. Everything else recedes into carbon-black stillness.

The system rejects decoration. No illustrations, no gradient flourishes, no friendly rounded cards with pastel backgrounds. It rejects the enterprise-gray trap equally: Skael is alive, not administrative. The difference is signal. Amber glows when something fires. Red appears when something breaks. The rest is monochrome discipline.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces separated by 1px borders, not shadows
Monospace for data, sans-serif for prose
CLI-native aesthetics adapted to spatial layout

rules.name: The Forge Heat Rule
rules.body: Amber appears on no more than 10% of any product screen. Its rarity is its power.

rules.name: The No Status Green Rule
rules.body: Green was removed as the accent. It appears only in trend-up indicators and terminal success markers.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Data Rule
rules.body: Any value that is a skill name, version, checksum, count, percentage, or timestamp uses Geist Mono.

rules.name: The No Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Shadows exist only as colored glows on active/focused accent elements.

dos: Do use monospace for every piece of data: skill names, versions, checksums, counts, timestamps.
Do separate surfaces with 1px solid Wire Dim borders.
Do use amber glows for active indicators and focused accent elements only.
Do test all text against WCAG AA on Void Black.
Do match :focus-visible treatments to hover treatments.
Do use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on numeric columns.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't apply background-clip: text with a gradient.
Don't build hero-metric templates (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text.
Don't use box-shadow on cards or containers.
Don't use pastel backgrounds, illustrations, or friendly rounded-everything (anti-ref: Intercom, HubSpot).
Don't overdesign with gradients and glass for spectacle (anti-ref: Vercel circa 2024).
Don't let the interface feel gray, dense, and dated (anti-ref: Jira, ServiceNow).
Don't use green (#22c55e) as the primary accent.
